/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mvgald.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/mvgald.dir/daemon/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mvgald.dir/daemon/daemon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mvgald.dir/daemon/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mvgald.dir/daemon/device_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mvgald.dir/daemon/memory_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mvgald.dir/daemon/power_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mvgald.dir/daemon/metrics_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mvgald.dir/daemon/ipc_server.cpp.o -o mvgald  -ldl /usr/lib64/libdrm.so /usr/lib64/libpciaccess.so
